paper.title: Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation

official_github_release.release_scope_note: The README describes the full 382-task benchmark but labels this release test_split. The archived manifest and top-level task directories contain 129 included test tasks only; the 253 train/validation tasks are not present. The archive exposes task generators, reference solutions, pytest verifiers, source records, and both 22-skill catalogues, but not the paper's EVOLUTION implementation, experimental trace pools, configured runs, or result records.
official_github_release.relationship_to_paper: The sole public GitHub commit was authored before arXiv v1 but committed and published eight days after v1. It is author-owned and cites the paper, but timing does not establish byte identity with the manuscript-time benchmark or experimental harness.

official_hugging_face_release.integrity_check: Locally assembled git archive passed ZIP integrity test
official_hugging_face_release.relationship_to_github_release: The Hugging Face tree contains the same 129-task test manifest and 22 generated/22 handcrafted skill bodies. Of 4,965 non-.git GitHub files, 4,895 are byte-identical at the Hugging Face revision; Hugging Face omits 14 GitHub files, adds .gitattributes, and represents 56 binary files as Git LFS pointer blobs in the pinned Git tree. The GitHub archive therefore remains the locally complete binary snapshot; the Hugging Face archive is retained to preserve the paper-linked dataset revision and pointer identities.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the immutable arXiv v1 PDF, extracted layout-preserving full text, and inspected the title/byline, benchmark and methods sections, release link, appendices, full result tables, example skills, and final page to verify coherent extraction through page 18. Pinned and archived both author-owned public releases, verified archive integrity, parsed the released manifest and provenance records, counted task/skill/verifier artifacts, and checked for the experimental harness, traces, configurations, and result records. This is source acquisition and release inventory, not a deep review, reproduction of reported results, validation of verifiers, or endorsement of transfer, expert, occupational, professional-capability, production-fitness, or readiness claims.
review_handoff: Use the full local paper text and complete GitHub release archive. Preserve the full-benchmark-versus-129-test-task release boundary and the absence of EVOLUTION code, train/validation tasks, experimental traces, run configurations, and result records when auditing the 382-task denominator, 3.7-6.7-point refinement gains, and 73.1% cross-model result. The Hugging Face Git snapshot contains 56 LFS pointers; use the GitHub archive for complete binary task assets.
local_storage_note: The PDF and release ZIPs are intentionally ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, paper index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable URLs/revisions above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
